pos_t Union Reference
[Bare Metal Environment APIs]

Type for tile coordinates; matches that used by hardware in most contexts, such as when sending an IDN or UDN message. More...


Data Fields

struct {
   uint32_t   len: 7
 Length (when used as an xDN header).
   uint32_t   y: 11
 Y coordinate.
   uint32_t   x: 11
 X coordinate.
   uint32_t   fb: 1
 FBit (when pos_t used as an xDN address).
   uint32_t   fr: 2
 Final route.
} bits
 Bitfield for set/get.
uint32_t word
 Word for send/receive.

Detailed Description

Type for tile coordinates; matches that used by hardware in most contexts, such as when sending an IDN or UDN message.

Field Documentation

uint32_t pos_t::len

Length (when used as an xDN header).

uint32_t pos_t::y

Y coordinate.

uint32_t pos_t::x

X coordinate.

uint32_t pos_t::fb

FBit (when pos_t used as an xDN address).

uint32_t pos_t::fr

Final route.

struct { ... } pos_t::bits

Bitfield for set/get.

uint32_t pos_t::word

Word for send/receive.
